symbols.name: InProcessQueueBrokerRuntime
symbols.summary: Stores in-process queue runtime state shared by the broker and the operational service.

symbols.summary: Initializes a new runtime store for the in-process broker.

syntax.content: public ValueTask EnqueueAsync(InProcessQueueTrackedItem item, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: Complete()
symbols.summary: Completes the internal channel writer.

symbols.name: ReadAllAsync(CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Reads all queued items until cancellation or completion.

symbols.name: GetSummary(QueueBrokerControlState)
symbols.summary: Gets a runtime summary of tracked items.
